    • getPlaceHolder

      public String getPlaceHolder(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer p, String identifier1, boolean javascript)
      Get placeholder value for offline player with javascript support.

      p - the offline player
      identifier1 - the placeholder identifier
      javascript - enable javascript processing
      Returns:
      the placeholder value

    • getPlaceHolder

      public String getPlaceHolder(org.bukkit.entity.Player p, String identifier)
      Get placeholder value for online player.
      Parameters:
      p - the player
      identifier - the placeholder identifier
      Returns:
      the placeholder value

    • getPlaceholderValue

      public String getPlaceholderValue(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer p, String identifier, boolean javascript, boolean forceProcess, boolean useCache)
      Get placeholder value with options.
      Parameters:
      p - the offline player
      identifier - the placeholder identifier
      javascript - enable javascript processing
      forceProcess - force processing of placeholder
      useCache - use cached value if available
      Returns:
      the placeholder value
